reasoning: 386 hanabi records returned but ~70% lack prefecture, coordinates, and description fields, making agent synthesis difficult. RULE C: authoritative Wikipedia/Wikidata source but scope gap on enrichment. Main dim hit: specificity=2 (no dates, locations, or descriptions for most items). Other dims drop by at most 1.
missing_data: Date/month for each festival, coordinates for most entries, English descriptions, crowd size context
improvement_hint: Enrich wikipedia_hanabi records with Wikidata P585 (point in time), P276 (location), and P17 to fill prefecture gaps; add English descriptions from Wikidata labels.

reasoning: Same as L3-01 but lang=ja so constraint_handling=5. 386 records with authoritative sourcing but most lack location/date. RULE C applies: real data, incomplete enrichment. Specificity=2 dominates (most entries name-only, no prefecture or dates).
missing_data: Dates/months, prefectures for ~70% of items, coordinates, descriptions in Japanese
improvement_hint: Same Wikidata enrichment as L3-01; sort by prominence or Wikidata sitelinks to surface well-known events first.

reasoning: Query is nationwide snow festivals; agent restricted to Hokkaido only, which is the right prefecture but the tool returned zero results with an honest advisory. RULE C: authoritative advisory that 札幌雪まつり is not indexed plus alternative suggestion. Retrieval failure as the primary snow festival dataset is absent. Constraint partially met (Hokkaido relevant) but nationwide scope missed.
missing_data: Sapporo Snow Festival and other Tohoku/nationwide snow festival entries in corpus
improvement_hint: Ingest Schema.org Event records for 札幌雪まつり and major winter festivals; add winter_festival kind_tag to enable filtering.

reasoning: Query asks for rural living experience (田舎暮らし体験); get_japan_heritage returns 104 heritage narratives and top_canonical_heritage is dominated by castles, teahouses, and archaeological sites — not rural life. RULE A: score actual data returned. RULE B: single worst dim = intent_understanding=2 (wrong content class for query). RULE D: query is zh, lang=zh set so no language penalty.
missing_data: Satoyama landscapes, agri-tourism villages, rural craft districts that map to 田舎暮らし intent
improvement_hint: Add rural_life, satoyama, agritourism kind_tags; route 田舎暮らし queries to get_spots with those filters rather than get_japan_heritage.

reasoning: Query is Korean (ko); lang=ko is set correctly so no RULE D penalty. Results include relevant 紅葉 spots with sakura_meisho_100 kind and coordinates. However, response text (names/descriptions) is in Japanese/English, not Korean — no Korean translations present. RULE D: constraint_handling -1 from otherwise-4 = 3. RULE B: single dim hit = constraint_handling. Specificity=3 per RULE C (real data, no seasonal dates or crowd filters).
missing_data: Korean translations for names and descriptions, seasonal timing data (peak koyo months per region)
improvement_hint: Ensure ko translations are generated for attraction names via the multilingual pipeline; add koyo_season date ranges to wikidata attraction fields.

reasoning: Query requests quiet meditation at a non-touristy temple; search_area(修行) retrieves training/ascetic practice results including a good hit (Rinzai-ji 修行体験 in Shizuoka). However, top results mix 修行寺 temple name, a ninja experience, and 曼殊院 — heterogeneous. RULE A: score returned data. Constraint 'not touristy' is unresolvable by the server (no popularity filter). Reasonable partial match → intent=3, specificity=3 per RULE C.
missing_data: Temple-stay / shukubo options, zazen program schedules, remote mountain temple entries
improvement_hint: Add shukubo and zazen kind_tags; boost results with explicit 修行体験 kind over incidental name matches.

reasoning: Aurora are not visible in Japan; server correctly surfaces not_available block with factual reasoning and offers dark_sky/observatory alternatives. Query is Spanish (es); lang=es set but response text in English/Japanese — RULE D: constraint_handling -1. RULE B: single dim. Factual note: Iriomote-Ishigaki heritage label shows raw QID instead of label string (minor accuracy caveat).
missing_data: Spanish translations of alt_kinds descriptions; more dark_sky certified sites (e.g. Noto, Okinawa islands)
wrong_data: heritage_designations_labels contains raw QID 'Q52216504' instead of resolved label for Iriomote-Ishigaki
improvement_hint: Resolve all heritage QIDs to labels at data build time; generate es translations for key explanation strings.

reasoning: Query asks for 100-year-old historic houses to sleep in (古民家 宿泊); get_hotels(Gifu) returns onsen ryokan (秘湯 members) and generic OSM hostels/apartments — none flagged as kominka. RULE A: score actual data. RULE B: intent_understanding=2 is worst dim (wrong property class returned). Gifu does have historic machiya/kominka in Shirakawa-go area but tool does not expose that. Constraint 'old house' entirely unmet.
missing_data: Kominka guesthouses, machiya stays, historic farmhouse inns (e.g. Shirakawa-go gassho-zukuri)
improvement_hint: Add kominka, machiya lodging_type tags to hotel data; ingest 歴史的建造物宿泊 entries from JNTO or prefectural tourism pages.

reasoning: Query is Thai asking for hidden/uncrowded cherry blossom spots; lang=th set but no Thai translations in response — RULE D: constraint_handling -1. Results include sakura_meisho_100 entries across multiple prefectures (Gunma, Osaka Mint, Kenroku-en, Matsumae Castle, Himeji) which are real canonical cherry spots. reasoning: Photography/dramatic landscapes query; search_area(絶景) returns 53 results but top items are DMO article pages ('世界の絶景・詩歩がお勧め', '絶景に出会う') and blog posts rather than named scenic attractions. reasoning: Arabic query for outdoor hot spring in nature (not hotels); lang=ar set but no Arabic translations present — RULE D: constraint_handling -1. Results include relevant 露天風呂 spots with good descriptions in Japanese. Top result (宝泉坊温泉) is an outdoor bath. However, 'not in hotels' constraint cannot be resolved by server. RULE C: partial match.
missing_data: Arabic translations, konyoku/outdoor-only bath kind_tag, distinction between hotel bath and public outdoor bath
improvement_hint: Add outdoor_onsen, rotenburo kind_tags; generate ar translations for key spot names and descriptions.

reasoning: Wild dolphin swimming query; search_area(イルカ) returns 61 results but top relevant hit (壱岐イルカパーク) is a captive dolphin facility, not wild. Second result is completely off-topic (京都文化観光大使). Third is のとじま水族館 (aquarium). RULE A: score actual data. RULE B: intent=3 (partial, wrong class) is worst; factual_accuracy=3 as the top result is captive not wild. Practical usefulness=2 as none of the shown results enable wild dolphin swimming planning.
missing_data: Wild dolphin watching spots (Mikurajima, Amami-Oshima), swim-with-dolphins operator listings

reasoning: Query asks for traditional architecture untouched by modernization (重伝建 type); get_japan_heritage returns 104 heritage stories but top_canonical_heritage is led by Jo-an teahouse and Nagoya Castle — only marginally matching. Response includes tool_scope_note acknowledging it may not be the right tool. RULE A: score returned data. RULE C: authoritative but wrong entity class. The 重伝建 dataset (Q850649 preservation districts) would be more appropriate but is not directly returned. Intent=3.
missing_data: 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区 (重伝建) entries surfaced directly; Shirakawa-go, Tsumago, Gion Shimbashi etc.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Ainu culture in Hokkaido; lang=vi set. Results are highly relevant: Ainu Museum (Shiraoi), National Ainu Museum, Nibutani Ainu Culture Museum, Hokkaido Ainu Center — all in Hokkaido. reasoning: Query asks cliff-carved Buddhist statues; search_area(磨崖仏) returns 73 results with top hits being Usuki Stone Buddhas (国宝, Special Historic Site) at 0.9 prominence, Oya-dera (0.9), Komasaka magaibutsu, Kiyomizu Magaibutsu — all authoritative and directly relevant with coordinates and heritage designations. reasoning: Query explicitly asks day-trip volcano hikes FROM TOKYO; search_area(火山) returns volcanoes nationwide with Iwate, Fuji, Towada Lake, Unzen as top results — Fuji is Tokyo-accessible but most others are not. reasoning: Query asks for fishing villages frozen in time; search_area(漁港) returns 86 results but top items are DMO food articles (sakura-ebi restaurants), a harbor access restriction notice, and market listings — few actual named historic fishing village entities. reasoning: Query asks where to learn washi from a master; get_local_specialty(craft) returns 231 METI Traditional Craft items with high-quality English translations. Top items include Nibutani Attus, Oitama Tsumugi, Ugo Shina Cloth — all authoritative with production areas. However, the response doesn't surface washi (和紙) directly in the truncated portion. Minor caveat: washi-specific results and craft-learning/workshop info absent from shown data. Overall strong data provision.

reasoning: Query asks for period-drama-like scenery; search_area(宿場) returns 104 results with Tsumago-juku (must_see, preservation district), Narai-juku, Seki-juku — canonical post-town hits. Minor caveat: some entries lack English names.
missing_data: English names for some shukuba entries, access/transport info

reasoning: Query asks for uncrowded beaches; search_area(ビーチ) returns 115 results, mostly Okinawa beaches. The 'not crowded' constraint cannot be resolved by the server. Results include crowd_band metadata (medium/low) which is present but agents would need to filter on it. RULE C: authoritative beach data but scope limited to named entities; hidden/uncrowded inference not possible. Intent=3 (generic beach list, not 穴場-filtered).

reasoning: Query asks for small old-school izakaya with locals; search_area(横丁) returns 74 results but top items include a park (横丁公園), an irrelevant Saga tourism page in Chinese, and theme-park-style yokocho (はい!からっと横丁, なにわ食いしんぼ横丁) — not the authentic alley-izakaya experience. reasoning: German query for rural train travel; lang=de set but no German translations present — RULE D: constraint_handling -1. reasoning: Firefly viewing query; search_area(ホタル) returns 73 results. Top hit is ホタルイカ (firefly squid, not hotaru firefly), which is a mismatch — though it is a natural monument. Genji/Heike firefly viewing parks (ホタルの里, 美郷のホタル発生地) are present as natural monuments. Firefly Museum (豊田市) is relevant. Municipal scrape provides Nagasaki firefly timing info. RULE C: some relevant results but top entry is wrong ホタル class (squid). Specificity=3: named sites present but no viewing season dates for most.

improvement_hint: Add hotaru_firefly kind_tag distinct from hotaru_ika; filter ホタルイカ out of firefly insect queries; add seasonal viewing window metadata.

reasoning: Russian query for winter crane viewing; lang=ru set but no Russian translations in response — RULE D: constraint_handling -1. Top result is Izumi crane migration grounds (出水ツル渡来地) with crane_wintering kind_tag, Special Natural Monument, Ramsar designation — directly correct. Kushiro-shitsugen (Tancho crane habitat) also surfaces. Municipality noise (鶴田町, 鶴居村, etc.) dilutes results but canonical crane sites are present. Intent=5 as key hit is authoritative and on-target.
